name: Akira Jougasaki
description: Hitomi Kashiwa's boyfriend.      ~!  In one of the episodes, he managed to find out about Hitomi's suicide attempt on an island. Together with Misaki and Kaoru, he rented a yacht and pursued on to that destination. On the brink of Hitomi's attempt to jump off a cliff, he affirmed his love for her and proposed, in which she accepted.!~
